title: Constant Contact vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Constant Contact vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Constant Contact vs HubSpot: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Constant Contact and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. Constant Contact is built for nonprofits and local businesses, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than HubSpot?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Constant Contact wins for nonprofits and local businesses, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or HubSpot?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
